evals.prompt: Create a skill for generating Terraform modules. It should auto-load when the user mentions infrastructure, terraform, or cloud provisioning. Should be both auto and manually invocable.
evals.expected_output: SKILL.md with proper frontmatter, description with trigger keywords, and step-by-step instructions
expectations: Frontmatter has name, description, disable-model-invocation: false, user-invocable: true
Description includes trigger keywords: terraform, infrastructure, cloud provisioning
Body includes code templates with file paths
Shows file structure as ASCII tree
Skill registered in root CLAUDE.md skills table

evals.prompt: Make a skill for our deploy process. It should only be user-invocable (not auto-triggered) since deploys are destructive. Takes an environment argument.
expectations: Uses $ARGUMENTS or $0 substitution for environment parameter
argument-hint field is set in frontmatter
Body includes safety checks or confirmation steps since it's destructive
